message:
Merge PR #2015: fix(deps): set GOBIN when auto-installing beads to prevent stale shadow binary

Bug fix: sets GOBIN to ~/.local/bin during go install to prevent stale shadow
binaries accumulating in ~/go/bin.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2015
Author: l0g1x (Krystian Gebis)
